long_description:
Cleanup ongoing CRC on SYD Prod Test Account
QA team is validating >10TB snapshot copy. 
Since its a large data snapshot it will take more than 2 days to get cleaned up. To reduce the time we are trying to abort the ongoing deletion operation on Snapshot copy, so that we can start other testing.
Incident source: NA - Jyotsnarani Panda

current_status_next_steps:
Logging to SYD deployer(mzone2h7) and Execute the below commands - 

1. kubectl proxy --port 8002 &
2. PROXYPID=$!
3. curl --header "Content-Type: application/json-patch+json" --request PATCH --data '[{"op":"replace","path":"/status/acadiaStatus/acadiaStageEntry/entryState","value":"Aborted"}]' http://localhost:8002/apis/storageservice.genesis.ibm.com/v1beta1/namespaces/9a9bcf0574b74eb6b1de49b236111f24/acadiaactions/EXPORT_SNAPSHOT_COPYr042-97421779-cf91-4461-9288-0f44e5c87a01/status

"kubectl get acadiaaction EXPORT_SNAPSHOT_COPYr042-8df5c61f-40d9-4494-8f53-5898f4380f3f -n 9a9bcf0574b74eb6b1de49b236111f24 -o yaml"
